question: Will Apple mention Anthropic or Claude in its WWDC 2026 keynote?
textDescription: This market resolves YES if Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote includes a spoken or on-screen mention of either "Anthropic" or "Claude". Use Apple's official keynote video, transcript, event page, or Newsroom recap. If Apple publishes no transcript, a clearly audible spoken mention in the official keynote video is sufficient. Mentions outside the main WWDC 2026 keynote, such as developer-session pages, interviews, partner documentation, or post-keynote press coverage, do not count unless Apple also included the mention in the keynote itself. Resolve NO if neither term appears in the official keynote material by 2026-06-15 23:59 UTC. Sources / resolver surfaces: - Apple WWDC: https://developer.apple.com/wwdc26/ - Apple Events: https://www.apple.com/apple-events/ - Apple Newsroom: https://www.apple.com/newsroom/
newsShortReason: Apple's internal use of Anthropic's Claude suggests a low likelihood of public mention at WWDC 2026.
newsKeyEvidence: Apple relies heavily on Anthropic's Claude for internal development work. | No public announcements or teasers indicate a mention of Anthropic or Claude at WWDC 2026. | Apple's focus on AI advancements at WWDC 2026 is expected to center on Siri and other technologies, not Anthropic or Claude.
